Scroll to the past-paper section on this page — we surface real Cambridge questions tagged to 1.1 from our mark-scheme library.

sections.content: Welcome to your **free Business Studies** lesson on **Business activity** (1.1). This is syllabus point 1.1 on **Paper 1 (Short Answer and Structured Questions)** — structured like a premium revision course, with past-paper practice built in.

items: Master the vocabulary examiners use in mark schemes for Business activity
Know which paper (P1) tests this topic most often
Practise at least one official past-paper question after reading
Use “Explain simpler” below if the main lesson feels too advanced

sections.content: Cambridge 7115 rewards answers tied to the case business — name the firm, quote stimulus data, and balance advantages against disadvantages. On Paper 1 (Short Answer and Structured Questions), Business activity often appears as part of a longer structured or case question.
